description: The Flutter Dart code blocks in flag-unflag-a-message.mdx use `AmitySocialClient.newMessageRepository()` (lines ~832, ~1221) but the SDK surface shows `newMessageRepository` belongs to `AmityChatClient`, not `AmitySocialClient`. Fix both occurrences. The blocks are currently marked with doc-as-test skip markers (class-body-fragment reason) â€” that skip reason should remain valid; only fix the AmitySocialClient reference in the source.
